Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}My mom said it was okay to take him home, and I came the next day to pick him up, but he was gone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}So I bet things will be better for him this way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}It's okay... I won't look for him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 413}I know he's doing great, somewhere out there.[n]{f 1 1}
